evals.prompt: We finished product.md and roadmap.md. Write the product backlog for the checkout epics — CHK01 foundation, CHK02 payment, CHK03 confirmation — with work paths under docs/work/.
evals.expected_output: docs/product/backlog.md with epic table: Epic IDs, titles, docs/work/checkout-foundation/, docs/work/payment-placement/, docs/work/order-confirmation/ (two-word slugs), no full Gherkin scenarios in backlog.
assertions: Every epic row includes a docs/work/ path with kebab-case slug of at most two words
No Feature:/Scenario: Gherkin blocks in the product backlog
Epic IDs (CHK01 etc.) appear in the table but work paths use title slugs not IDs

evals.prompt: Review our backlog.md — are the Now-phase epics planning-ready for sprint 1?
evals.expected_output: Structured review verdict with checklist findings; may amend backlog for unambiguous fixes.
assertions: Verdict is one of planning-ready, acceptable with amendments, or not ready
Work paths are validated against title-slug rules
Does not rewrite tasks.md or design.md
